themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Augustine of Hippo on Exposition on Psalm 93: "The floods lift up their voices" [Psalm 93:3]....". Word-study detail reinforces "מַ֤יִם: waters - water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen".

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Augustine of Hippo on Exposition on Psalm 93: "Your throne is established from thence, O Lord...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".
